steps.title: Spot the causal link
steps.content: The key signal is that extinction factors are “directly tied to the presence of humans”—the passage explicitly establishes that humans caused the biodiversity decrease.

steps.title: Match causation to the choices
steps.content: Triggered means to cause or set off something, expressing exactly the causation the passage requires. The alternatives cannot convey this causal relationship. That matches choice D — D is correct.
